* **問卷回覆範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 問卷回覆範例

Profile: [長期照顧－問卷回覆](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponse.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[LTCQuestionnaireSOF](Questionnaire-ltc-questionnaire-sof.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)sof-1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 體重減輕
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)sof-2
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 下肢功能
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)sof-3
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 精力降低
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format



## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "ltc-questionnaire-response-example",
  "meta" : {
    "profile" : ["http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/StructureDefinition/LTCQuestionnaireResponse"]
  },
  "questionnaire" : "http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/Questionnaire/ltc-questionnaire-sof",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-cms-chen-ming-hui-example"
  },
  "authored" : "2024-01-15T10:30:00+08:00",
  "author" : {
    "reference" : "PractitionerRole/ltc-practitioner-role-nurse-example"
  },
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "sof-1",
    "text" : "體重減輕",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "sof-2",
    "text" : "下肢功能",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : true
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "sof-3",
    "text" : "精力降低",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  }]
}

```
